mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ai_chat_session ORDER BY last_message_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_chat_session (session_id, user_id, session_name, message_count, last_message_time, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{userId}, #{sessionName}, #{messageCount}, #{lastMessageTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ai_message WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY create_time ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_message (session_id, message_id, role, content, sql_text, chart_data, execution_time_ms, row_count, feedback_score, feedback_comment, create_time) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{messageId}, #{role}, #{content}, #{sqlText}, #{chartData}, #{executionTimeMs}, #{rowCount}, #{feedbackScore}, #{feedbackComment}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ai_favorite_query WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_favorite_query (user_id, query_text, query_name, execution_count, last_execute_time, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{queryText}, #{queryName}, #{executionCount}, #{lastExecuteTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ai_scheduled_query WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_scheduled_query (user_id, task_name, query_text, schedule_cron, push_type, push_target, enabled, last_run_time, next_run_time, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{taskName}, #{queryText}, #{scheduleCron}, #{pushType}, #{pushTarget}, #{enabled}, #{lastRunTime}, #{nextRunTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
